package.name: gz_ros2_control_manager
package.description: Gazebo Harmonic GUI plugin: discover ROS 2 controller_manager instances at runtime by scanning ROS 2 services, list their controllers and hardware components, and activate/deactivate already-loaded controllers from the Gazebo GUI without relying on Gazebo ECM, model names, SDF/URDF/XACRO inspection, or any importer-side metadata.
